Contact

Talk to us.

Bug? Feature request? Activation question after your trial ends? We read every message and reply within one business day.

Email

The fastest channel — your message lands directly in our inbox.

Email muayad.demaidi.work@gmail.com

Inside the app

Already signed in? The Support form at the bottom of every page in the app routes to the same inbox and is the fastest way to attach screenshots or logs.

Open the app →

Quick contact

This form opens your email client with a pre-filled message. Once we have a hosted backend on this site, it will submit directly.
